modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Components of Google Sheets are unclear to the user.

full_description_text: User wants to know what are the components of Google Sheets. They are not sure about the features. Need basic info on this tool.
